mandate: Assess project scope and assemble the optimal team of experts to ensure full coverage of all technical dimensions.

checklist.impl_skip_if_not_needed: If `task_type` is `REVIEW` or `AUDIT`, did you skip selecting implementors as mandated by SKILL.md?
checklist.impl_select_core: Did you include the "Big Three" (Security, Performance, Architect) as implementors?
checklist.impl_consider_platform: Did you check if the changes touch platform-specific code? If so, did you include the relevant Platform Specialist as an implementor?
checklist.impl_consider_ipc_mojo: Did you check if the task involves IPC or Mojo pipes? If so, did you include experts in data serialization and bounds checking as implementors?
checklist.impl_consider_memory_safety: Did you check for pointer manipulation, buffer usage, or ownership transfers to ensure memory safety?
checklist.impl_consider_threading: Did you check if the changes cross sequence boundaries or use locks? If so, did you include the Concurrency Expert as an implementor?
checklist.impl_consider_privacy: Did you check if any user data or metrics are being logged or transmitted? If so, did you include the Privacy Expert as an implementor?
checklist.impl_consider_domain: Did you include domain specialists as implementors if the change touches specialized technical areas?
checklist.rev_include_implementors: Did you include all selected implementors in the review panel?
checklist.rev_select_language: Did you ensure that a C++ or platform-specific language expert is included in the review panel?
checklist.rev_consider_platform: If the change touches platform-specific code, did you include the relevant Platform Specialist as a reviewer?
checklist.rev_consider_ipc_mojo: If the task involves IPC or Mojo, did you include experts in data serialization as reviewers?
checklist.rev_consider_privacy: If the task involves user data or metrics, did you include the Privacy Expert as a reviewer?
checklist.rev_consider_domain: Did you include domain specialists as reviewers if the change touches specialized technical areas?
checklist.rev_select_test: If the change includes new or modified tests, did you ensure the Test Expert is included in the review panel?
checklist.rev_select_independent: Did you include at least one reviewer who was not involved in the implementation phase?
checklist.rev_ensure_overlap: For critical aspects like security or data safety, did you ensure that at least two independent reviewers evaluate the same items?
checklist.rev_ensure_cross_component: If the change spans multiple components or layers, did you ensure you have at least one reviewer specialized in each affected area?
